messages.content:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: visual-direction board for a construction company website
Primary request: Create a polished dark stylescape board for a credible commercial and industrial construction firm, showing high-contrast typography, commanding imagery crops, restrained signal-color accents, and engineered surface language without becoming a finished homepage screenshot.
Scene/backdrop: Dark graphite presentation board with layered bands, metallic detail lines, and selected image panels.
Subject: Assertive technical web-brand direction for construction delivery and project control.
Style/medium: Premium raster stylescape, cinematic editorial board, realistic materials, no device frame.
Composition/framing: Portrait board, layered horizontal structure, one hero image anchor, bold type specimens, cropped detail strips, clear rhythm changes.
Lighting/mood: Moody but readable, controlled, urban, night-shift confidence.
Color palette: Midnight graphite, carbon, steel smoke, signal amber, soft light concrete.
Constraints: Stylescape board only. No full webpage. No sci-fi interface. No luminous neon overload. No long readable text. No fake data dashboards.
Avoid: Cyberpunk look, startup SaaS dashboard, glossy black-and-gold luxury, malformed text, noisy HUD graphics.

response_text: Here is the dark-themed stylescape board for an industrial construction company. The design features high-contrast sans-serif typography paired with commanding imagery of structural work. I have included technical details—like concrete surfaces and rebar grids—anchored by strong horizontal bands in graphite and carbon. The introduction of signal amber is used for highlights and CTA placement, providing an "engineered" feel without replicating a finished webpage layout.
